Flashcard.title: Flashcard
Flashcard.description: A flashcard with AI-generated content based on Quran and Hadith.

topic.description: The topic or question described by the admin.

description.description: The descriptive text shown on the card (no impact on AI generation).

imageUrl.description: The URL or base64 data of the attached image.

aiResponse.description: The AI-generated response in the style of a wise narrator.

authorId.description: The UID of the admin who created the card.

boardId.description: The ID of the board this card belongs to.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the card was created.

Board.title: Board
Board.description: A collection of flashcards representing a specific theme or board.

description.description: A brief description of the board's theme.

authorId.description: The UID of the admin who created the board.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the board was created.

User.title: User
User.description: A user profile containing global settings.

globalBackImageUrl.description: The URL of the global background image for the back side of all cards.

defaultBoardName.description: The custom name for the default Wisdom Board.

defaultBoardDescription.description: The custom description for the default Wisdom Board.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the profile was last updated.

/users/{userId}.description: Collection of user profiles and settings.
